panels.description: Close up shot: The Creature looks into a shard of a mirror reflecting a distorted, scarred, and massive face. Dark, gloomy lighting, internal agony visible in eyes.

bubbles.text: Was I, then, a monster, a blot upon the earth? I cannot describe the agony these reflections inflicted upon me.

panels.description: Medium shot: The Creature peeking through a crack in a wooden wall, watching a warm, lit cottage interior with envy and longing.

bubbles.text: I loved their gentle manners, yet I was forever shut out, watching only by stealth.

panels.description: Medium shot: A split vignette showing a father playing with a child, seen by the Creature. The Creature's hand touches the wall, fingers trembling.

bubbles.text: I saw how the father doted on the smiles of the infant. What is this bond that binds them?

panels.description: Wide shot: The Creature hunched over in a dark, cold cave, surrounded by scraps of wood and debris, holding head in hands, looking miserable.

bubbles.text: Miserable, unhappy wretch! I want to understand these relationships... the ties between brother and sister.

panels.description: Medium close up: The Creature gazing back toward the distant cottage lights, determined but sorrowful. Soft moonlight illuminating the profile.

bubbles.text: I will learn their history. I will know why they are so dear to me.
